description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline that uses the default Docker image clickable/ci-$UT_VERSION-$ARCH:$CLICKABLE_VERSION with UT_VERSION set to 20.04 and CLICKABLE_VERSION set to 8, and selects a runner tag based on the project namespace (ubports → ubports, otherwise saas-linux-small-amd64). Define two stages, build and publish, and three architecture‑specific build jobs (build-amd64, build-arm64, build-armhf) that each set ARCH and ARCH_TRIPLET variables (amd64/x86_64-linux-gnu, arm64/aarch64-linux-gnu, armhf/arm-linux-gnueabihf), run the script clickable build --clean --accept-review-errors, and store the resulting app binary in build/$ARCH_TRIPLET/app as a one‑week‑old artifact. Add a publish job in the publish stage that runs only when a Git tag is present, uses the amd64 variables, executes clickable publish --arch amd64 -- "$CI_COMMIT_MESSAGE", clickable publish --arch arm64, and clickable publish --arch armhf, and uploads all *.click files from the three architecture build directories as a one‑week‑old artifact.
